news.t: It's Rough Out There. But These 5 Funds Are Crushing It.

holdings.infoBox: CTEF is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 8.44%, Lam Research at 7.24%, Western Digital at 7.01%, Jabil at 6.20%, and Comfort Systems USA at 5.70%.

overview.description: The Castellan Targeted Equity ETF (CTEF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund invests in US-listed companies of any market capitalization, combined with a covered call overlay. The actively managed ETF uses a proprietary methodology that blends both quantitative and qualitative analysis. CTEF was launched on Jun 18, 2025 and is issued by Castellan.

data.title: It's Rough Out There. But These 5 Funds Are Crushing It.
data.text: Despite the gloomy headlines, market breadth is increasing. More stocks are moving higher.
